scope: champion_bodypart producer in S03 and weighted consumer in S09

producer_contract.class_contract: exact ordered v1 vocabulary for IDs 0..55, including background
producer_contract.output: S03/custom_bodypart.png as a 16-bit indexed ontology map
validation: hash-verified checkpoint and inference configuration through the production MMSeg loader
producer_contract.gpu_lifecycle: provider closes in finally on success and every refusal

pipeline_contract.co_subject_suppression: other_person_protected pixels are zeroed in the custom map before S05/S09
pipeline_contract.promotion_cache: missing or stale custom provenance forces S03
pipeline_contract.rollback_cache: removing the champion role forces S03 and atomically removes stale custom artifacts

current_live_registry.interpretation: the existing draft pipeline remains unchanged until a D6/G7 winner is promoted

not_claimed: No trained champion, D6/G7 score, or live champion inference is claimed by this item; those remain governed by MF-P5-07.02.
